name: Dungeon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together 1 cup (2 sticks) unsalted butter, 1/2 cup brown sugar, and 1/2 cup white sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in 2 eggs and 2 teaspoons vanilla extract.
4. Mix in 1 cup flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon baking soda.
5. Fold in 1 cup oats and 1 cup raisins.
6. Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
7. Bake for half an hour.
8. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into bars (32 pieces).
